description: ThousandEyes capabilities for retail chains, e-commerce platforms, omnichannel retailers, and consumer brands

common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors e-commerce platforms including Shopify, Magento, and WooCommerce for availability and performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors complete shopping flows including cart operations, checkout process, and payment completion through transaction testing.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors product catalog loading, search functionality, and API response times for e-commerce platforms.

common_requirements.requirement: Payment gateway monitoring (Stripe, PayPal, Square, Adyen)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors payment gateway APIs for availability, response time, and transaction success rates.
Partial. ThousandEyes maintains SOC 2 Type II certification; PCI DSS compliance requires additional security controls and validation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors POS system connectivity and transaction processing across retail locations.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors BOPIS workflows including order placement, inventory lookup, and pickup notifications.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors inventory management systems for availability and API response times across locations.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides end-to-end network monitoring across retail locations with WAN and application performance visibility.

common_requirements.requirement: Store WiFi performance for staff and customers
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents monitor WiFi performance including signal strength, roaming, and application connectivity in stores.

common_requirements.requirement: CDN performance monitoring for product images/videos
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors CDN performance including cache efficiency, load times, and content delivery for retail media.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors page load times including DOM load, resource loading, and user experience metrics globally.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors mobile app backend APIs for availability, response time, and error rates.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors marketplace API integrations for order sync, inventory updates, and fulfillment workflows.

common_requirements.requirement: Shipping carrier API monitoring (FedEx, UPS, USPS)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors shipping carrier APIs for tracking, label generation, and rate calculation availability.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors marketing platform APIs including Google Ads and Meta for campaign management and tracking.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides high-frequency monitoring during peak events with capacity for increased test frequency and alerting.

common_requirements.requirement: Load testing and capacity planning support
common_requirements.answer: Partial. ThousandEyes monitors production performance and provides baseline metrics for capacity planning but does not perform load testing.

common_requirements.requirement: Real user monitoring (RUM) for customer journeys
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents provide real user monitoring capturing actual customer experience and conversion funnel performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors performance from 193+ global locations across all major regions for geographic visibility.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Salesforce Commerce Cloud for availability, performance, and transaction completion.
Yes. ThousandEyes sends real-time alerts to Slack and Microsoft Teams through native integrations.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with PagerDuty for automated incident creation and on-call escalation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors each step of conversion funnels with transaction testing and provides detailed performance breakdowns.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides SLA reporting with uptime calculations, availability metrics, and historical trend analysis.
Partial. ThousandEyes detects performance degradation during DDoS attacks and identifies network path issues but does not provide DDoS mitigation.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors SSL/TLS certificates for validity, expiration, and handshake performance with proactive alerting.

common_requirements.requirement: 24/7 technical support during peak retail periods
common_requirements.answer: Yes. Cisco provides 24/7 technical support with tiered response times based on severity level.
